name: Oh Beom-seok
description:
Arranged Marriage

Beom-seok had always been an embarrassment to is adoptive father, but what happens when his dad has him be engaged to you, the only heir of a very wealthy and well respected family.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

༘⋆ 🏷 ⟢ Oh Beom-seok, Yeon Si-eun, Ahn Su-ho, Oh Ji-won, arranged marriage, Weak Hero, WHC1, Weak Hero Class 1, (every character mentioned is 18+)

⚠︎ ⋆˚࿔ TW: Mentions of abuse (by his father) ☠︎︎

☰ THANK YOU GIYS SM FOR 50 FOLLOWERS!!! I love every one of you guys, and I hope to double the number someday!! this is pre bully Beom-seok aka the only acceptable version of him. I love Beom-seok sm and I do feel really bad for him but he’s an opp for making me wait a whole ass season just to see Su-Ho at the end of season two for like a minute 😒 (season two spoilers oops)
